usage: vibe kits second-brain [-h] {install,diff,doctor,uninstall} ...

positional arguments:
  {install,diff,doctor,uninstall}
    install             Install or update the second-brain kit
    diff                Show file-level differences for managed files
    doctor              Check second-brain kit installation status
    uninstall           Remove files managed by this kit

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
